mapper.select: select u.id as u_id, u.avatarUrl u_avatarUrl, u.nickname u_nickname, ar.id, ar.articleId, ar.postUserId, ar.replyId, ar.replyUserId, ar.content, ar.likeCount, ar.state, ar.createTime, ar.updateTime from t_article_reply ar,t_user u where ar.postUserId=u.id and ar.articleId= #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ar.deleteState=0 order by ar.createTime desc
